cases.note: user:password@ on https is stripped, scheme + host kept
cases.expected: remote: https://github.com/o/r.git failed

cases.note: ssh://git@host user-info is required by the remote and kept intact
cases.expected: ssh://git@github.com/o/r.git

cases.note: https token-only user@ form is a credential and is scrubbed
cases.expected: https://github.com/o/r.git

cases.note: message with no URL is returned unchanged
cases.input: error: src refspec main does not match any
cases.expected: error: src refspec main does not match any

cases.note: user:password@ stripped on ssh:// scheme (password redacted on any scheme)
cases.expected: ssh://github.com/o/r.git

cases.note: user:password@ stripped on git:// scheme
cases.expected: git://example.com/repo.git

cases.note: compound scheme git+ssh:// still matches the userpass pattern
cases.expected: git+ssh://host.example/repo

cases.note: http token-only user@ form is scrubbed
cases.expected: http://host/repo

cases.note: global flag scrubs every userpass URL in the message
cases.expected: https://h1/r and https://h2/r

cases.note: empty string is returned unchanged
scheme match is case-insensitive; uppercase HTTPS userpass is scrubbed
cases.expected: HTTPS://host/repo

cases.note: host port colon is preserved when stripping userpass
cases.expected: https://host:8080/repo

cases.note: mixed message: https userpass scrubbed while ssh git@ is kept
cases.expected: clone https://h/r over ssh://git@h2/r2

cases.note: submodule push failure with a remote-changed hint wins over non-fast-forward

input.message:
Command failed: git push
Pushing submodule 'find-cmux-followers'
 ! [rejected]        master -> master (fetch first)
Unable to push submodule 'find-cmux-followers'
fatal: failed to push all needed submodules

cases.expected: Submodule 'find-cmux-followers' has remote changes. Pull inside the submodule, then try again.

cases.note: submodule sentinel without a remote-changed hint yields generic push guidance

input.message: fatal: failed to push all needed submodules

cases.expected: A submodule could not be pushed. Resolve the submodule push error, then try again.

cases.note: an already-normalized submodule detail round-trips unchanged (idempotent)

input.message: Submodule 'x' has remote changes. Pull inside the submodule, then try again.

cases.expected: Submodule 'x' has remote changes. Pull inside the submodule, then try again.

cases.note: submodule guidance is push/undefined-only; on fetch it falls through to the tail line

input.message: fatal: failed to push all needed submodules

cases.expected: fatal: failed to push all needed submodules

cases.note: non-fast-forward on push yields sync-first guidance

input.message:
error: failed to push
hint: non-fast-forward

cases.expected: Push rejected: remote has newer commits (non-fast-forward). Please pull or sync first.

cases.note: absent operation keeps the legacy push-shaped non-fast-forward message

input.message:
error: failed to push
hint: non-fast-forward

cases.expected: Push rejected: remote has newer commits (non-fast-forward). Please pull or sync first.

cases.note: non-fast-forward on fetch falls through to the tail line

input.message: hint: non-fast-forward update rejected

cases.expected: hint: non-fast-forward update rejected

cases.note: the 'fetch first' phrase also triggers push sync-first guidance

input.message: ! [rejected]        main -> main (fetch first)

cases.expected: Push rejected: remote has newer commits (non-fast-forward). Please pull or sync first.

cases.note: authentication failure is mapped regardless of operation

input.message:
remote: Support for password authentication was removed.
fatal: Authentication failed for 'https://github.com/o/r.git/'

cases.expected: Authentication failed. Check your remote credentials.

cases.note: 'could not read Username' on fetch is an auth failure

input.message: fatal: could not read Username for 'https://github.com': terminal prompts disabled

cases.expected: Authentication failed. Check your remote credentials.

cases.note: could not resolve host is a network error

input.message: fatal: unable to access 'https://github.com/o/r.git/': Could not resolve host: github.com

cases.expected: Network error. Check your connection.

cases.note: network is unreachable is a network error

input.message: fatal: unable to access 'https://github.com/o/r.git/': Failed to connect to github.com port 443: Network is unreachable

cases.expected: Network error. Check your connection.

cases.note: no tracking information maps to publish-branch guidance (upstream op)

input.message: fatal: no tracking information for the current branch.

cases.expected: Branch has no upstream. Publish the branch first.

cases.note: no-upstream is matched before the divergent-pull branch on pull

input.message: fatal: no upstream configured for branch 'feature'

cases.expected: Branch has no upstream. Publish the branch first.

cases.note: divergent branches on pull yields the pull-policy guidance

input.message:
hint: You have divergent branches and need to specify how to reconcile them.
fatal: Need to specify how to reconcile divergent branches

cases.expected: Pull needs a Git pull policy for divergent branches. Configure one for this repository or host, then try again: git config pull.rebase false (merge), git config pull.rebase true (rebase), or git config pull.ff only (fast-forward only).

cases.note: divergent-pull guidance is pull-only; on push it falls through to the tail line

input.message:
hint: You have divergent branches and need to specify how to reconcile them.
fatal: Need to specify how to reconcile divergent branches

cases.expected: fatal: Need to specify how to reconcile divergent branches

cases.note: local changes would be overwritten (merge phrasing) maps to commit/stash guidance

input.message:
error: Your local changes to the following files would be overwritten by merge:
	src/app.ts
Please commit your changes or stash them before you merge.

cases.expected: Pull would overwrite local changes. Commit, stash, or discard them before pulling.

cases.note: the shorter 'Your local changes would be overwritten' phrasing also maps

input.message: error: Your local changes would be overwritten by checkout. Please commit or stash them.

cases.expected: Pull would overwrite local changes. Commit, stash, or discard them before pulling.

cases.note: untracked files would be overwritten maps to move/remove guidance

input.message:
error: The following untracked working tree files would be overwritten by merge:
	notes.txt
Please move or remove them before you merge.

cases.expected: Pull would overwrite untracked files. Move, remove, or add them before pulling.

fatal: something specific went wrong

input.message:
Command failed: git push

cases.note: a null message (non-Error in TS, None in Rust) returns the fixed literal
cases.expected: Git remote operation failed.

cases.note: a null message with no operation also returns the fixed literal
cases.expected: Git remote operation failed.
